\tzpentry{ID4206}{Solar Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4206 introduces Solar Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2 h_{\mu\nu} \cdot \Psi_{\text{solar}} = \lambda_n \Psi_{\text{solar}} \end{equation}
